question_text: Let 𝑋1, 𝑋2, … , 𝑋𝑛 be a random sample of size 𝑛⁡(≥11) from a population with

options.C: ontinuous and strictly increasing cumulative distribution function 𝐹(⋅) with an unknown median 𝑀. To test 𝐻0:⁡𝑀= 10 against 𝐻1: 𝑀> 10 at level 𝛼, let the statistic 𝑇 denote the number of observations larger than 10. Let 𝑡0 be the observed value of the test statistic 𝑇. Consider the test which rejects 𝐻0 if 𝑇≥𝑐. Then the 𝑝-value of the test is
